login.title: Log in to Taska online demo
login.lead: Open the demo to see the modules, interface and logic of working without registering on the call. Leave a request for a personal review of your business.
login.bullet1: Live interface: tasks, funnel, finances and reports in one loop.
login.bullet2: You can quickly "probe" scenarios: from the application to payment and notifications.
login.bullet3: Demo is not a substitute for calling: we will still help you to adapt the processes for you.
